label: electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability of an organism to use a specific chemical compound as a terminal electron acceptor in its electron transport chain during cellular respiration.

label: inorganic electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use inorganic compounds as terminal electron acceptors.

label: sulfur compound electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use sulfur-containing compounds (such as elemental sulfur, sulfate, sulfite, or thiosulfate) as terminal electron acceptors in anaerobic respiration.

label: iron oxide electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use iron(III) oxides or oxyhydroxides as terminal electron acceptors in anaerobic respiration.

label: nitrate electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use nitrate (NO3-) as a terminal electron acceptor in anaerobic respiration, typically reducing it to nitrite or gaseous nitrogen compounds.

label: nitrite electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use nitrite (NO2-) as a terminal electron acceptor in anaerobic respiration.

label: sulfate electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use sulfate (SO4 2-) as a terminal electron acceptor in anaerobic respiration.

label: arsenate electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use arsenate (AsO4 3-) as a terminal electron acceptor in anaerobic respiration.

label: manganese oxide electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use manganese(IV) oxides as terminal electron acceptors in anaerobic respiration.

label: selenate electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use selenate (SeO4 2-) as a terminal electron acceptor in anaerobic respiration.

label: organic electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use organic compounds as terminal electron acceptors in anaerobic respiration.

label: fumarate electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use fumarate as a terminal electron acceptor, reducing it to succinate.

label: DMSO electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use dimethyl sulfoxide (DMSO) as a terminal electron acceptor in anaerobic respiration.

label: TMAO electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use trimethylamine N-oxide (TMAO) as a terminal electron acceptor in anaerobic respiration.

label: thiosulfate electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use thiosulfate as a terminal electron acceptor in anaerobic respiration.

label: tetrathionate electron acceptor capability
definition: The capability to use tetrathionate as a terminal electron acceptor in anaerobic respiration.
